How would this teamcomp potentially fare? Doll so that she dispels paralyse, ramona to copy twice, Mouchette as a potential subdps and Alva main
Just finished first chapter cryig
that was fast lol
Ramona last place so she can tank and dies, she is not that necessary for that team, meanwhile alva is important, if she dies then 50%of your setup is bricked
You can place alva 1st place then mouchette 2nd place, doll 3rd place
And lastly ramona
It's a setup that can also counter pierce cards
If you placed alva 3rd place then they do stuff like pierce stagnation from hameln and your mouchette is also bricked
Pollux SSR wheel is useless on this comp tbh
Treasured rarity is too niche
If you encounter hameln gmurphy then those 2 wheels are literally useless af
Btw you use ramona, so memory syndrome is also pointless
Pollux teams have been my fav this patch
The buffs they threw em were really nice
Just overshadowed by insta kill atm

Could i get some help for daffo comps? here's all my units and wheels
I really like the way she plays in traphase, but been struggling to get wins lol
Tbh
Daff is kind of niche to be played
She get hard countered by barrier
Have low hp to tank hits
Compared to other red units
And she need to spam card to be able to increase her dmg card
However if you still want to play her you can go with sorel daff combo
Sorel exalt most highest hp unit with her vuln weakness card
It should deal around 70 dmg
Then daff finish them with with around 40 dmg counting the debuff
So everyone regen 20 alienus
It's rough too because need exalt ready on low regen alienus team
If you still want to play her then you can go with skill dmg increase wheels
Or fouette daff
There is another combo which is ramona daff
You dupe her scaling dmg card that way
And this time you aim for skill dmg amp + reunion on ramona
Horla's SSR wheel is quite good and since ramona is arithmetica bot for traphase you shouldn't worry too much about arithmetica
yeah, i kind of thought so, with all the oneshot stuff going around and her wanting to scale lol
Yeah it's really rough
It would be better something like alva with pandia's wheel
So each strike remove 20 alienus
But then daff kind of not relevant
Because alva too important to let her die
It's still up to you, if you still want to go with daff then i can tell you the full team based on what you currently have
The devs just really fked up all pick
So it's gmurphy meta that wins anyway
You can't have fun there
i still would like to play daff, even though she's weak i find her gameplan fun
I actually thought about the ramona dupe thingy but hadn't tested it yet
She can be useful in all pick
Just it's RNG to get her
You use reunion on her, you dupe daff cards while getting arithmetica so you can place your high cost wheels
If you want you can do something like
Using ghelot wheel on daff for 2 amplification perma buff
Then switch it with horla's SSR wheel 5 cost
So you get 20% dmg buff from amp x 50% from WoD effect

Castor can be really good in draft
But mid in all pick
